title: Paying Utility Bills 水电费缴费

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Mr. Johnson, I received the utility bill for last month. It seems higher than usual. Can we go through it together?
lines.cn: 约翰逊先生，我收到了上个月的水电费账单。看起来比平时高。我们能一起看看吗？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: Sure, let me check my records. The electric bill was one hundred and twenty dollars, water was forty, and gas was thirty-five.
lines.cn: 好的，让我查一下记录。电费120美元，水费40美元，燃气费35美元。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: That is one hundred and ninety-five in total. Last month it was only one hundred and fifty. Why did it go up so much?
lines.cn: 总共195美元。上个月才150美元。为什么涨这么多？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: It is winter now, so the heating is on more. Also, you used the dryer a lot, which uses a lot of electricity.
lines.cn: 现在是冬天，暖气开得多。而且你用了很长时间的烘干机，很耗电。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: I see. I did not realize the dryer used that much power. Is there anything I can do to save money?
lines.cn: 我明白了。我没意识到烘干机这么耗电。有什么办法可以省钱吗？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: You can air-dry clothes when possible, and keep the thermostat at sixty-eight degrees. That helps a lot.
lines.cn: 你可以尽量自然晾干衣服，并把恒温器调到68华氏度。这能帮很大忙。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Good tips. Can I pay the bill through an app or do I need to transfer money to your account?
lines.cn: 好建议。我可以通过应用付款，还是必须转账到你的账户？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: You can use Venmo or bank transfer. Either way is fine. Just send me a screenshot when it is done.
lines.cn: 你可以用Venmo或银行转账。哪种都行。付完后给我发个截图就好。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: I will pay today. Also, should I expect the same amount next month, or will it change?
lines.cn: 我今天会付。另外，下个月账单大概也一样吗，还是会变？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: It should be similar until spring. Once the weather gets warmer, the bill will go down again.
lines.cn: 到春天之前应该差不多。天气变暖后，账单会再次下降。
